title: rubus pugiunculosus
intro: Rubus pugiunculosus, also known as the small-bracted dewberry, is a type of shrub in the rose family that is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve pain. The health benefits of Rubus pugiunculosus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Rubus pugiunculosus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
